queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of negative checking account balances as a primary determinant of default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigating the mitigating impact of minimal savings account balances on credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Analytical assessment of the absence of documented savings accounts as a credit risk reduction indicator.
